name: Review grading advances the card and removes it from the due queue
description: After a user grades a flashcard during a review session, the card should advance through the FSRS scheduling pipeline (the grade is written to Supabase via a Server Action) and the card should NOT appear again in the same session. This test verifies the grade → persist → queue-advance round-trip works end-to-end.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Verify either a flashcard is shown (front side visible) OR a session-complete / no-cards-due empty state is shown — either is a valid outcome
If a card is shown: reveal the answer by clicking the reveal button, then grade it using any grade button (e.g. 'Good' or grade 3)
Verify the graded card disappears and either the next card appears OR the session-complete screen appears — confirming the grade was accepted and the card advanced in the queue
